a11y-001.summary: The product page has critical accessibility issues: images lack alt text and links lack discernible names. These prevent screen reader users from understanding page content and navigating.

findings.title: Image elements do not have [alt] attributes
findings.finding: Product images lack descriptive alt text, making product information inaccessible to screen reader users.

findings.title: Links do not have a discernible name
findings.finding: Navigation and action links lack accessible names, preventing keyboard and screen reader users from understanding link destinations.

a11y-002.summary: Low text contrast ratio on the landing page creates readability barriers for users with low vision.

findings.title: Background and foreground colors do not have a sufficient contrast ratio
findings.finding: Text colors do not meet minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text, reducing readability.

a11y-003.summary: Checkout form has multiple accessibility barriers including missing labels and hidden focusable elements.

findings.title: Form elements do not have associated labels
findings.finding: Form inputs lack programmatically associated label elements, making form completion impossible for screen reader users.

findings.title: Select elements do not have associated labels
findings.finding: Dropdown select elements lack associated labels, preventing screen reader users from identifying form fields.

findings.title: ARIA hidden element contains focusable elements
findings.finding: A container with aria-hidden=true contains focusable elements, creating a focus trap for keyboard users.

recommendations.action: Add descriptive alt attributes to all product images
recommendations.implementationGuide: For each element, add an alt attribute describing the product: . For decorative images, use alt="".
